text.title: Offline Toolkit Checklist Worked Example
text.summary: One worked end-to-end example showing inputs, the filled artefact, and the validator pass.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Indie hacker has a 3-day off-site starting tomorrow at 06:00 local. They run Offline Toolkit Checklist on cadence: pre-flight at -24h, dry-run at -12h, final-go at -2h.

list.item: Dated trigger event = scheduled trip on cron at -24h.

section.title: Filled artefact (excerpt)
Validator trace
section.p: Running `python3 scripts/validate-offline-toolkit-checklist.py --file out.json` exits 0; running with the bad example exits 1 and prints VIOLATION lines per missing required field. `--self-test` exits 0 on both built-in fixtures.
